title: Datapack Easy
description: Copy datapacks from a global folder
body:
This is a simple mod - it creates a global datapacks directory in your Minecraft folder. and datapack in that folder will be copied to and loaded by a world on world start.

Will not remove old datapacks/datapacks not in global folder.

Will not update datapacks.

This mod is fairly simple - barring any unforeseen changes to how datapacks work, this mod should work even on versions not marked here on curseforge. (Older MC versions might not though)

Requires Fabric API
